form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after four months won by a head at Newcastle Prov Cl1 March 31 over 1250m defeating Erin Jo carrying 59.5kg at $2.60. Previously second-up second last in a small field at Randwick 3&4yo Bm64 on November 4 over 1300m, slow going 6 len behind Equerry carrying 59.5kg at $6. Can progress quickly this time in.

formComments.title: TAB

previousStarts.stewardsComment: On jumping shifted out and bumped Extreme Diamond.
Began awkwardly.

form.formComment: Recent form sound. At the latest run 3rd of 10 at Hawkesbury Cl1 on March 26 over 1300m, 1.2 len behind Your Chilli with 60kg at $4.40. The start before that got back early 4th in a small field at Kembla Grange Bm64 on March 13 over 1400m, slow going 3.5 len behind Pappa Blue with 60.5kg at $2.10. Made headway last time. Maps well and comes out of a strong contest.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up rounding the home turn.
Near 700m shifted in and bumped Siriusly Hot.
On jumping bumped by Stormland.

form.formComment: Most recently 5th of 9 at this track Cond Bm68 on March 28 over 1200m, slow going 1.75 len behind Show Business carrying 57.5kg at $3.60. The race before that 4th of 13 at Dubbo Wra Champ on March 15 over 1400m, 1.75 len behind Poisen Point with 57.5kg at $4.40. Rates highly despite drawing out.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Approaching the 200m, shifted out and made contact with State Of Grace.
Raced wide and without cover throughout the event.
At the start bumped by Nevermista.

form.formComment: Racing well recently. At the latest run won by 1.75 len at this track Mid Cl1 April 4 over 1100m in soft going defeating The Netball Queen carrying 56kg at $5. The run before that 3rd of 8 at Port Macquarie Cg&E Cl1 on March 24 over 1200m, slow going 2 len behind Patrioticintention with 59.5kg at $2.90. One of the leading chances with the claim.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began awkwardly.
Shifted out and bumped another runner at the entrance to the straight.

form.formComment: Back from a spell. Only had one start last campaign tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 5th of 7 at Newcastle Cl1 on January 31 over 1300m, 2.75 len behind Embrace The Wind with 59kg at $4.80. When resuming last campaign 6th of 11 at Kembla Grange Mdn on May 10 over 1200m, on a slow track; 5.5 len behind Mother Goose with 60.5kg at $4.20. Has figured in the placings when fresh in the past but looks a bit out of his depth.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted out on jumping and bumped Wild Thoughts.
On jumping, bumped by Reveillon.
Bumped with Mailata approaching the winning post.
Near the 1000m, shifted in when not clear.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break of five months. Finished off last campaign seventh of 12 at Newcastle Cond Bm68 November 20 over 1400m, soft track; 6 len behind Laurel Hill carrying 57.5kg at $4.20. Previous preparation first-up won by nose Tamworth Mdn July 18 over 1400m on heavy track defeating Xerxes with 60.5kg at $2.40. Back in grade and can surprise fresh.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began awkwardly, shifted out and then bumped Orthie's Boys.
Tightened for room on jumping between School Fees and Helluva Finish.

form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last preparation fifth of 7 at Gosford Cl1 December 28 over 1600m, 3.5 len behind So Long Farewell with 57.5kg at $3.70. On debut second of 9 at Hawkesbury Super 3yo Mdn-Sw November 27 over 1300m, 0.6 len behind Good Hotspur carrying 57kg at $7. Gelded over the break with the two trials, keep safe.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted in on jumping and bumped Shotgun Bella.
On jumping, shifted ground. Laid in under pressure in the home straight.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Most recently came home strongly from last on the turn; 4th of 7 at Newcastle Prov Cl1 on March 31 over 1250m, 0.8 len behind Lightning Glory with 58.5kg at $26. Before that 4th of 7 at Beaumont (Newcastle) Cl1 on March 23 over 1200m, on a slow track; 4.5 len behind Autumn King with 61kg at $11. Needs it easier.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin.
On jumping contacted, hampered when crowded between Cuban Rain and Starinion.

form.formComment: At the latest run favourite; won by a long-neck at Gosford Super Mdn-Sw April 2 over 1200m defeating Jonson with 58.5kg at $1.30. The start before that sat on the speed throughout before fading to run last of 7 at Warwick Farm 3yo Mdn-Sw on March 11 over 1400m, slow going 25 len behind Spice Prawn with 57kg at $2.90. Progressive gelding worth including.
